description: Acceptance record created by an invitee, acknowledging a collaboration invite. Lives in the invitee's PDS. The combination of an existing invite and a matching acceptance — both non-deleted — is what grants the invitee's writes to be surfaced against the subject record.

invite.description: StrongRef to the corresponding pub.chive.collaboration.invite record.

subject.description: StrongRef to the subject record of the invite (collection, eprint, etc.). Redundant with the invite reference but convenient for firehose-time indexing before the invite is resolved.
